title: Slingshot (THM)

headings.text: 2- What was the first scanner that the attacker ran against the web server?
3- What was the User Agent of the directory enumeration tool that the attacker used on the web server?
4- In total, how many requested resources on the web server did the attacker fail to find?
5- What is the flag under the interesting directory the attacker found?
6- What login page did the attacker discover using the directory enumeration tool?
7- What was the user agent of the brute-force tool that the attacker used on the admin panel?
8- What username:password combination did the attacker use to gain access to the admin page?
9- What flag was included in the file that the attacker uploaded from the admin directory?
10- What was the first command the attacker ran on the web shell?
11- What file location on the web server did the attacker extract database credentials from using Local File Inclusion?
12- What directory did the attacker use to access the database manager?
13- What was the name of the database that the attacker exported?
14- What flag does the attacker insert into the database?

overview: Slingway Inc., a leading toy company, has recently noticed suspicious activity on its e-commerce web server and potential modifications to its database. To investigate the suspicious activity, they've hired you as a SOC Analyst to look into the web server logs and uncover any instances of malicious activity.

study.overview: Slingway Inc., a leading toy company, has recently noticed suspicious activity on its e-commerce web server and potential modifications to its database. To investigate the suspicious activity, they've hired you as a SOC Analyst to look into the web server logs and uncover any instances of malicious activity.
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.
keyConcepts: 2- What was the first scanner that the attacker ran against the web server?
3- What was the User Agent of the directory enumeration tool that the attacker used on the web server?
4- In total, how many requested resources on the web server did the attacker fail to find?
5- What is the flag under the interesting directory the attacker found?
workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
Pivot through related notes, telemetry sources, and MITRE references.
Document findings, gaps, containment options, and detection improvements.
tips: insert is an operation that adds new data into a database table typically used in SQL
